public enum esriXYEventError

Fields

XYEVENT_E_CANT_DELETE_FIELD = -2147201015

-2147201015: Can't delete a mandatory location field.

XYEVENT_E_CANT_SELECT = -2147201017

-2147201017: Can't Select.
